intro: A big-eared dinosaur’s big adventure! Help Stompy save his herd in this heartwarming interactive story.
description:
A young, big-eared Brachiosaurus undertakes a journey with new friends to save his herd, proving his unique trait is their greatest asset.

Stompy is a young Brachiosaurus with ears much too big for his head, or so everyone says. When his herd runs out of water, he sets out alone to find the Valley of Seven Springs. Along the way he meets Fern the Pterodactyl, Rumble the T-Rex, and Bouldie the Triceratops. His extraordinary ears turn out to be exactly what the journey needs.

• 10 chapters. A complete story. Above 10,000 words.
• 5 original dinosaur characters.
• Full background music score and sound effects throughout.
• Read together or let a child explore alone.
• Short sessions. Easy to pause and pick up anytime.
• Themes: courage, friendship, self-acceptance.
• Ages 4–8.
• No ads - No in-app purchases - All ages.
